title: Enter verification code
subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email.
label: Verification code
hint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
resendSuccessDescription: A new verification code has been sent to your email.

success.title: Your email has been verified!
success.subtitle: You can proceed to creating your organization.

errors.verificationFailed: Verification failed. Please check the code and try again.
errors.resendFailed: Failed to resend the verification code. Please try again later.
